programs.title: The Cosby Show
programs.desc: Cliff tries to coax the grandfather (Sammy Davis Jr.) of an unwed mother-to-be into providing moral support for the girl.

programs.title: The Cosby Show
programs.desc: Cliff and Clair let Rudy stay up as late as she wants when she complains about all the house rules.

programs.desc: Theo's troubles with Justine (Michelle Thomas) inspire him to visit a voodoo doctor (Moses Gunn).

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: When a mother of five is found murdered in her home, detectives catch a break in the case when a key witness comes forward; putting the killer behind bars proves to be much more difficult than anticipated.

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: A hopeful New Year's Eve turns into a tragedy when a man is found shot inside his home; is this just a devastating accident involving a neighborhood celebration?; is it possible this man was the target of a calculated attack?

programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: An ambitious single mother with a bright future finds love in a man with a troubled past. When he is linked to murder, she stands by him. And as evidence mounts, loyalty turns to liability as she faces a harsh truth: love could cost her everything.
